HIGH BUG-004 JavaScript errors detected (1 error)
Description

The module has 1 JavaScript error(s). This can cause silent failures in quiz scoring, animations, or SCORM data reporting.

Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open index.html in Chrome
  2. Press F12 → Console tab
  3. Observe red error messages on load
Error Messages
[bundle] error
Impact
May cause unexpected behaviour, broken interactions, or incorrect score reporting.

HIGH BUG-006 3 external image(s) failed to load
Description

The module links to 3 image(s) on external servers. These are either private, deleted, or permissions have expired.

Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open index.html
  2. Observe blank spaces
  3. Check browser console for 403/404 on external URLs
